name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
Beige smooth calfskin. YSL Saint Laurent has released a bestseller. The (Saint Laurent) chain bag is incredibly popular in the fashion world. This old French luxury brand possesses a unique magic, and the look is full of highlights! Original factory material imported calfskin, Italian custom-engraved logo hardware, every detail authentic to the ZP standard! A favorite of celebrities, not only is the appearance high, but it is also a powerhouse![Smile][Smile][Smile]Size: 20×17×6cm, Model: 1855
